description: heavy external gem imported for a task that a few lines of plain Ruby handles
input:
# Gemfile
gem 'chronic'          # natural-language date parsing
gem 'money-rails'      # money types
gem 'aasm'             # state machine
gem 'paper_trail'      # versioning
gem 'pundit'           # authorisation
gem 'draper'           # decorators
gem 'reform'           # form objects
